zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Ragnvaldsdottir於1174年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾時，她的父親Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles27歲，母親Fonia Moray29歲。她與Angus MacBeth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1245年在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Ragnvaldsdottir于1174年出生在苏格兰維托史爾时，她的父亲Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles27岁，母亲Fonia Moray29岁。她与Angus MacBeth结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1245年在英国苏格兰維托史爾享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Ragnvaldsdottir was born in 1174, in Wigtownshire, Scotland, her father, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, was 27 and her mother, Fonia Moray, was 29. She married Angus MacBeth. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1245, in Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Ragnvaldsdottir est née en 1174, à Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Fonia Moray, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Angus MacBeth. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Ragnvaldsdottir 1174 in Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles 27 und ihre Mutter Fonia Moray 29. Sie hat Angus MacBeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Ragnvaldsdottir è nata il nel 1174 nel Wigtownshire, Scotland, sua padre, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Fonia Moray, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Angus MacBeth. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1245, nel Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Ragnvaldsdottirが1174年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesは27歳，母Fonia Morayは29歳であった。Angus MacBethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1245年にイギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアで71歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Ragnvaldsdottir(이)가 1174년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Fonia Moray(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Angus MacBeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Wigtownshire, Scotland: Na h-Ùige, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Ragnvaldsdottir nasceu em 1174, em Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Fonia Moray, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus MacBeth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Wigtownshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Ragnvaldsdottir родилась в 1174 г. в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Fonia Moray, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus MacBeth. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Ragnvaldsdottir nació en 1174, en Wigtownshire, Scotland, su papá, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Fonia Moray, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Angus MacBeth. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1245, en Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
